profiles.label: Paragraph Window
profiles.description: Default paragraph-aware text chunking for general curated knowledge files.
governance_notes: Use when document headings are weak or not semantically meaningful.

profiles.label: Markdown Section Window
profiles.description: Preserves markdown section headings in chunk locators for standards and implementation guides.
governance_notes: Prefer this profile for standards where section provenance matters.

profiles.label: Terminology Concept Card
profiles.description: Keeps terminology concept records compact so codes, labels, synonyms, and source URLs stay together.
governance_notes: Do not split one terminology concept across unrelated chunks.

profiles.label: API Record Summary
profiles.description: Chunks cached API records by record boundary with endpoint, query, fetch time, and response hash metadata.
governance_notes: Requires a fetch job to preserve endpoint and query provenance.

profiles.label: PDF Page Window
profiles.description: Chunks extracted PDF text by page or page window while preserving page references.
governance_notes: Use after document extraction records page-level provenance.

profiles.label: Internal Policy Section
profiles.description: Section-aware chunking for internal governance and review policies.
governance_notes: Use for policy evidence shown to operators.
